text.title: Build vs Buy Decision Framework Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (capability, forecast, vendor shortlist, build estimate)?

text.example: Capability: customer-support help desk. Differentiation score 2 → default Buy. TCO: Buy $180k / 3y vs Build $420k / 3y. Pilot Zendesk vs Intercom — Zendesk passes; integration ≤4 weeks. Exit plan: weekly CSV export + 90-day notice. ADR-BB-007 Accepted, review trigger = Zendesk price + 30% YoY OR support volume > 5x.
